/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -O3 -DNDEBUG -shared -Wl,-soname,libabb_librws.so -o libabb_librws.so CMakeFiles/abb_librws.dir/src/system_constants.cpp.o CMakeFiles/abb_librws.dir/src/rws_poco_client.cpp.o CMakeFiles/abb_librws.dir/src/rws_poco_result.cpp.o CMakeFiles/abb_librws.dir/src/rws_rapid.cpp.o CMakeFiles/abb_librws.dir/src/rws_subscription.cpp.o CMakeFiles/abb_librws.dir/src/rws_websocket.cpp.o CMakeFiles/abb_librws.dir/src/rws.cpp.o CMakeFiles/abb_librws.dir/src/parsing.cpp.o CMakeFiles/abb_librws.dir/src/connection_options.cpp.o CMakeFiles/abb_librws.dir/src/common/rw/rapid.cpp.o CMakeFiles/abb_librws.dir/src/common/rw/panel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/abb_librws.dir/src/v1_0/rws.cpp.o CMakeFiles/abb_librws.dir/src/v1_0/rws_client.cpp.o CMakeFiles/abb_librws.dir/src/v1_0/rws_interface.cpp.o CMakeFiles/abb_librws.dir/src/v1_0/rw/rapid.cpp.o CMakeFiles/abb_librws.dir/src/v1_0/rw/panel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/abb_librws.dir/src/v1_0/rw/io.cpp.o CMakeFiles/abb_librws.dir/src/v1_0/rws_state_machine_interface.cpp.o CMakeFiles/abb_librws.dir/src/v2_0/rws.cpp.o CMakeFiles/abb_librws.dir/src/v2_0/rws_client.cpp.o CMakeFiles/abb_librws.dir/src/v2_0/rws_interface.cpp.o CMakeFiles/abb_librws.dir/src/v2_0/rw/rapid.cpp.o CMakeFiles/abb_librws.dir/src/v2_0/rw/panel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/abb_librws.dir/src/v2_0/rws_state_machine_interface.cpp.o  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libPocoFoundation.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libPocoNet.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libPocoUtil.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libPocoXML.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libPocoNetSSL.so -ldl
